testcase.name: Web Template App › app should load successfully
Web Template App › should display homepage content
Web Template App › should handle navigation to different locales

failure.message: app.spec.ts:23:7 should handle navigation to different locales

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › app.spec.ts:23:7 › Web Template App › should handle navigation to different locales ─
Error: expect(received).toMatch(expected)
Expected pattern: /\/(en|es|fr|de|pt)\/?/ Received string: "http://localhost:3250/"

testcase.failure:
